items.text: FMD Tech builds reliable, scalable software and hardware solutions that help businesses launch faster and grow with confidence.
Full-stack technology services built around your growth
Web and mobile applications built to fit your exact workflow
Scalable systems that stay fast and stable as you grow
Practical automation and machine learning built into your product
Ongoing monitoring and maintenance so nothing breaks quietly

Founded by engineers who were tired of clunky software, FMD Tech builds clean, dependable technology for businesses that can't afford downtime. We combine deep technical expertise with a genuine focus on the people using what we build.
What teams say after working with us
FMD Tech rebuilt our platform in half the time we expected, and it hasn't gone down once since launch.
Their team feels like an extension of ours. Communication was clear from day one to launch.
We finally have infrastructure we trust. Support response times are excellent too.
Tell us about your project and we'll get back within one business day
